title: MTR Foods is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: MTR Foods is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!
